mapper.select: SELECT c.cart_item_id as cartItemId, c.book_id as bookId, b.title as title, b.price as price, c.quantity as quantity, (b.price * c.quantity) as totalItemPrice, b.image_url as imageUrl FROM Cart_Items c JOIN Books b ON c.book_id = b.book_id WHERE c.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Cart_Items (member_id, book_id, quantity) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{bookId}, #{quantity})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM Cart_Items WHERE cart_item_id = #{cartItemId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
